mapper.sql: (SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(parent_id, ''), user_id) FROM com_user WHERE user_id = #{userId})
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(MAX(item_no), 0) + 1 FROM cm_topo_item WHERE user_id =
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cm_topo_item ( user_id, item_no, grp_no, mng_no, dev_kind1, dev_kind2, usr_kind, item_size, xpoint, ypoint ) VALUES ( , #{itemNo}, #{grpNo}, 0, 'POINT', 'POINT', 'POINT', 2, #{xpoint}, #{ypoint} )
